title: Quality Assurance Specialist II
must_haves: 5+ years in quality assurance/audit/operational quality in a high-scale or regulated environment
Demonstrated ownership of QA or controls programs with measurable impact
Strong data skills including dashboard/reporting development
Cross-functional experience (Ops Enablement, Vendor Management, Product, Compliance)
Experience in financial services or fintech
nice_to_haves: Prior vendor QA management and calibration program ownership
Experience with automation-enabled QA tools (e.g., conversational AI outputs)
